commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the agent read wrapper to retry missing bare `YYYY-MM-DD.md` reads as `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`, threads workspace-root validation into that retry, adds workspace-path regression tests, and adds a route-proof script.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +96, Other +205. Total +356 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source: on current main, a bare `YYYY-MM-DD.md` read is passed to the base read tool relative to the workspace root while startup context uses `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. I did not run a live secondary-agent session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed because the remaining blockers are proof redaction, proof-only script removal, and maintainer acceptance of the fallback boundary rather than a fully safe autonomous repair.
